channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bill Maher’s Category Error on Socialism
item.description: There’s a big difference between government assistance and government control.

item.title: Congress Should Say No to Funding the Ballroom
item.description: The building of a new ballroom is no scandal, but it should be funded privately, as originally claimed, and not by taxpayers.

item.title: Democratic congressman launches probe of DOJ settlements with Biden-era FBI whistleblowers
item.description: The top Democrat on the House Judiciary Committee launched an investigation into allegations that the Department of Justice paid millions of dollars t...

item.title: New York Enters the Redistricting Wars
item.description: The path to a new gerrymandered map may be more difficult than state Democrats would hope.
